name: MiniMax M2.5 / M2.5-Lightning
seoTitle: MiniMax M2.5 / M2.5-Lightning — MiniMax LLM specs
metaDescription: MiniMax M2.5 / M2.5-Lightning (MiniMax), released 2026-02-12 — part of the MiniMax M-Series line. 230B-total / 10B-active MoE, ~205K context; 80.2% SWE-Bench V…
overview: MiniMax M2.5 / M2.5-Lightning is a large language model from MiniMax, part of the MiniMax M-Series line. Released 2026-02-12. MiniMax's flagship MoE LLM line built for coding and agentic/tool-use workflows, shipped as fast point releases.
What's notable in this version: 230B-total / 10B-active MoE, ~205K context; 80.2% SWE-Bench Verified; standard (50 tok/s) plus faster Lightning (100 tok/s) variant.
